summary: Regression after package.json bump (date-fns ^3.6.0, react-day-picker ^9.0.0). All backend endpoints and all frontend flows pass. Zero console errors, zero react-day-picker / date-fns module errors.
passed: GET /api/slots?date=2026-01-15 -> 200 with all_slots(10), available, booked arrays
Home loads after loader, hero shows 4.6 rating
Navbar Book Now (nav-book-btn) opens booking-dialog, date carousel works, slot selection works, booking-submit produces booking-success card with confirmed ref
Service card opens detail dialog, 'Book this service' preselects service (Hair) in booking dialog
Testimonials next/prev buttons clickable; toggle-all-reviews reveals exactly 45 review cards
Footer newsletter submits and shows 'Subscribed. See you in your inbox.' toast
Zero console errors on home page; zero react-day-picker/date-fns errors after dep upgrade
notes: Booking success modal does not auto-close (requires CLOSE button); not a bug, just expected UX. Dependency upgrade is fully clean — Calendar component is dormant in the live site, no runtime impact.
